# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-service
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-service
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  roleRef:
    apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
    kind: ClusterRole
    name: my-service
  subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: my-service
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Destination
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-service
  port: http
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceRoleBinding
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  roleRef:
    apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
    kind: ClusterRole
    name: my-service
  subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: my-service
